description: Ben Pasternick discusses the concept of Internet Capital Markets and his experiences in the crypto space, including his initial exposure to Meme Coins and the development of Cloud. He shares insights on the challenges and excitement of building in a rapidly evolving environment.
topic_summary: In this interview, Ben Pasternick, founder of Believe, explores the future of finance through Internet Capital Markets and reflects on his journey in the crypto world, particularly with Meme Coins and Cloud [t=6:16].
